calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Sherry Kathleen Burdick, petitioner is sworn and examined. The Court grants the petition for change of name to Sherry Kathleen Sly. Order signed in open court.
Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599; Bailiff:
